export_custom_routes.description: Determines whether to export custom routes from the peer network. Must be set to true or false.

export_subnet_routes_with_public_ip.description: Determines whether subnet routes with public IPs are exported to the peer network; must be true or false.

import_custom_routes.description: Determines whether custom routes from the peer network are imported into the current network; must be set to true or false.

import_subnet_routes_with_public_ip.description: Determines whether subnet routes with public IP addresses are imported from the peer network. Must be set to true or false.

name.description: Specifies the name of the network peering connection, which must be unique within the project and adhere to GCP naming conventions.

network.description: Specifies the name or self-link of the network to which the peering will be applied; must be within the same project.

peer_network.description: Specifies the full self-link of the peer network that will be connected via peering. Must be in the same project or have appropriate permissions.

stack_type.description: Specifies the type of stack (e.g., development, staging, production) to determine the environment for the network peering configuration.

timeouts.description: Specifies timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations.
